title: Course: COSC 480 - Introduction to Image Processing and Analysis
course_name: Introduction to Image Processing and Analysis
description: Covers digital image processing theory and algorithms including acquisition, formation, enhancement, color space conversion, histogram generation, segmentation, feature extraction, and clustering/classification.
prerequisites_text: COSC 220 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 480 - Introduction to Image Processing and Analysis
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 220 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Covers digital image processing theory and algorithms including acquisition, formation, enhancement, color space conversion, histogram generation, segmentation, feature extraction, and clustering/classification.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group C
